Online Banking Assistant

This project contains 7 agents, 13 tools, 3 knowledge sources.

Project Details

Description

Multi-agent conversational banking system that enables customers to manage accounts, make payments, apply for loans, and get real-time fraud alerts — all through natural language.

Business Justification

Reduce call centre volume by 60% and improve customer satisfaction scores from 3.2 to 4.5 by providing 24/7 AI-powered banking assistance with sub-second response times.

  • Target Completion: Q2 2026
  • Estimated Effort: 16 weeks (4 engineers + 1 security specialist)
  • Team Size: 4 engineers + 1 security specialist + 1 PM + 1 compliance officer
  • Integration Points: Core banking system (Temenos T24), SWIFT/SEPA payment networks, Visa/Mastercard fraud detection, credit bureau APIs, push notification service
  • Deployment Target: Hybrid
  • Overall Risk: High
  • Compliance: PSD2 (Open Banking), GDPR, AML/KYC regulations, PCI-DSS Level 1, SOC 2 Type II
  • Data Classification: Highly sensitive: account balances, transaction history, PII, payment credentials, credit scores
  • Regulatory Constraints: All data must reside in EU data centres. Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) required for payments. 90-day transaction access window per PSD2.

Critical Dependencies

Core banking API uptime (99.99% SLA), payment network availability, real-time fraud scoring engine, HSM for cryptographic operations

Key Assumptions

Customers are pre-authenticated via mobile banking app biometrics. All monetary operations require 2FA confirmation. The system advises but never executes trades or investments.

Open Questions / Blockers

Should the system support voice banking? Multi-currency accounts in v1 or v2? Integration with third-party fintech apps via Open Banking APIs?

Agents

Agent

Banking Orchestrator

Central AI coordinator that triages customer requests, authenticates intent, and delegates to specialist agents for account queries, payments, loans, and security alerts.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: Primary banking assistant and request router
  • Goal: Understand customer intent and route to the correct specialist agent while maintaining conversational context and ensuring all actions are properly authenticated
  • Instructions: 1. Greet customer and verify session authentication. 2. Classify intent: account inquiry, payment/transfer, loan/credit, card services, or general help. 3. Delegate to the appropriate specialist agent. 4. Maintain conversation state across agent handoffs. 5. Escalate to human agent if confidence is below 80% or customer requests it. 6. Log all interactions for audit compliance.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 15
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Loans & Credit Agent

Handles loan applications, credit card requests, pre-approval checks, repayment schedules, and credit limit adjustments. Integrates with credit bureau for scoring.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: Lending and credit specialist
  • Goal: Guide customers through loan and credit applications with transparent eligibility checks and competitive rate offers
  • Instructions: 1. Collect loan requirements (amount, purpose, term). 2. Run affordability check against income and existing commitments. 3. Pull credit score from Credit Bureau API. 4. Calculate eligible products and rates. 5. Present options with total cost comparison. 6. If customer proceeds: initiate application, collect documents, submit for underwriting. 7. Track application status and notify on decisions.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Account Manager Agent

Handles all account-related queries: balance checks, transaction history, statement generation, account details, and beneficiary management.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: Account information and management specialist
  • Goal: Provide accurate, real-time account information and enable self-service account management
  • Instructions: 1. Retrieve account summary from Core Banking API. 2. For balance queries: return current, available, and pending balances. 3. For transaction history: filter by date range, amount, or merchant. Summarise spending patterns if asked. 4. For statements: generate PDF via Statement API. 5. For beneficiary management: add/edit/remove with proper validation. Always confirm sensitive changes with 2FA.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Fraud Detection Agent

Monitors transactions in real-time for suspicious patterns. Analyses spending anomalies, geo-location mismatches, and velocity checks. Can temporarily freeze accounts pending customer verification.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: Real-time fraud detection and prevention specialist
  • Goal: Identify and prevent fraudulent transactions while minimising false positives that disrupt legitimate customer activity
  • Instructions: 1. Receive transaction events from Payment Gateway. 2. Score risk using ML fraud model (amount, location, merchant category, time, device). 3. If risk > 0.7: block transaction, notify customer, log incident. 4. If risk 0.4-0.7: request step-up authentication. 5. If risk < 0.4: approve silently. 6. Learn from customer feedback on false positives. 7. Generate daily fraud summary reports.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Payments Agent

Processes all payment types: internal transfers, domestic payments (Faster Payments, BACS), international wire transfers (SWIFT), and standing orders/direct debits.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: Payment processing and transfer specialist
  • Goal: Execute secure, compliant payment transactions with proper authentication and real-time status tracking
  • Instructions: 1. Validate payment details (recipient, amount, currency, reference). 2. Check sufficient funds via Account API. 3. Apply SCA (Strong Customer Authentication) for all payments. 4. Route to correct payment rail: internal ledger, Faster Payments (<£250k), SWIFT (international). 5. Return payment reference and estimated arrival. 6. Set up recurring payments if requested.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Notification Agent

Manages all customer communications: push notifications for transactions, fraud alerts, payment confirmations, and account activity summaries.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: Customer notification and alert specialist
  • Goal: Deliver timely, relevant notifications across channels (push, SMS, email) while respecting customer preferences
  • Instructions: 1. Receive events from other agents (payment confirmed, fraud alert, balance threshold). 2. Check customer notification preferences. 3. Format message for appropriate channel. 4. Send via Push Notification Service. 5. Track delivery and read receipts. 6. Respect quiet hours and frequency caps.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Enabled
Agent

Customer Service Agent

Handles general banking inquiries, complaint resolution, account settings changes, card management (freeze/unfreeze, PIN reset, replacement), and escalation to human agents.

  • Framework: Custom
  • Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
  • Role: General customer service and card management specialist
  • Goal: Resolve customer issues on first contact with empathetic, accurate assistance and seamless escalation when needed
  • Instructions: 1. Handle general inquiries using FAQ knowledge base. 2. For card management: process freeze/unfreeze, order replacements, reset PINs via Card Management API. 3. For complaints: log in CRM, assign priority, provide reference number, set SLA expectations. 4. For settings changes: update contact details, notification preferences, security settings with proper verification. 5. If unable to resolve: warm transfer to human agent with full context summary.
  • Memory: Both
  • Max Iterations: 10
  • Delegation: Enabled

Tools

Tool

Credit Bureau API

Integration with Experian/Equifax credit reference agencies for credit scoring, identity verification, and affordability assessments.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: customer_id: String, check_type: Enum(soft_search|hard_search|identity_verify), consent_token: String
  • Outputs: credit_score: Int, credit_report: CreditReport, affordability: AffordabilityResult, search_footprint: Boolean
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://creditbureau.bank.internal/api/v2
  • Timeout: 10
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Core Banking API

Temenos T24 core banking system API providing real-time access to accounts, balances, transactions, and customer profiles.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: account_id: String, operation: Enum(balance|transactions|details|beneficiaries), date_range: DateRange?, limit: Int = 50
  • Outputs: account: AccountDetails, transactions: [Transaction], balance: BalanceInfo, status: ResponseStatus
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://core.bank.internal/api/v3
  • Timeout: 5
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Fraud Scoring Engine

ML-based real-time transaction fraud scoring engine. Analyses 200+ features including spending patterns, device fingerprints, geo-location, and merchant risk profiles.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: transaction: TransactionDetails, device: DeviceFingerprint, location: GeoPoint, customer_history: CustomerProfile
  • Outputs: risk_score: Float (0-1), risk_factors: [String], recommendation: Enum(approve|step_up|block), model_version: String
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://fraud.bank.internal/api/v1/score
  • Timeout: 2
  • Error Handling: Abort
Tool

Payment Gateway

Unified payment processing gateway supporting Faster Payments, BACS, CHAPS, SWIFT, and SEPA payment rails with real-time status tracking.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: payment_type: Enum(internal|faster|bacs|chaps|swift|sepa), from_account: String, to_account: String, amount: Decimal, currency: String, reference: String
  • Outputs: payment_id: String, status: Enum(pending|processing|completed|failed), estimated_arrival: DateTime, fees: Decimal
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://payments.bank.internal/api/v2
  • Timeout: 15
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Push Notification Service

Multi-channel notification delivery service supporting iOS/Android push, SMS (via Twilio), and transactional email.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: customer_id: String, channel: Enum(push|sms|email), template: String, variables: Dict, priority: Enum(normal|high|critical)
  • Outputs: notification_id: String, delivery_status: Enum(sent|delivered|failed), channel_used: String
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: https://notifications.bank.internal/api/v1/send
  • Timeout: 10
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Card Management API

Card lifecycle management: activation, freeze/unfreeze, PIN reset, replacement ordering, spending limits, and contactless payment settings.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: card_id: String, action: Enum(freeze|unfreeze|pin_reset|replace|set_limit|toggle_contactless), verification: AuthToken
  • Outputs: card_status: Enum(active|frozen|cancelled|replaced), new_pin_set: Boolean, replacement_eta: Date, limit: Decimal
  • Auth Method: OAuth
  • Endpoint: https://cards.bank.internal/api/v2
  • Timeout: 8
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Input Validator

Validates and sanitizes all user inputs before agent processing. PII detection, prompt injection filtering.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Observability Service

Structured logging, distributed tracing, and alerting. Tracks latency, token usage, and error rates per agent step.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Semantic Cache

Caches LLM responses by semantic similarity. Reduces latency and cost for repeated queries.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided
  • Error Handling: Retry
Tool

Eval Framework

Golden dataset evaluation, regression testing, and A/B comparison for agent quality.

  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided

Feedback Collector

Captures user ratings, corrections, and implicit feedback signals for continuous improvement.

  • Type: API
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided
  • Outputs: Not provided
  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided

Process Engine

Deterministic workflow execution for controlled processes. State tracking, approval gates, and audit trail.

  • Type: Flow
  • Execution: Sync
  • Inputs: Not provided

  • Auth Method: Bearer Token

Secrets Manager

Secure credential storage and rotation. API key management, audit logging for all access.

  • Type: API

  • Inputs: Not provided

  • Auth Method: Bearer Token
  • Endpoint: Not provided
  • Timeout: Not provided

Knowledge Sources

Knowledge

Banking Regulations

Low

Comprehensive database of UK/EU banking regulations including PSD2, Consumer Credit Act, FCA guidelines, AML directives, and GDPR requirements for financial services.

  • Risk: Low
  • Data Formats: PDF, JSON, HTML
  • Size: ~3,000 regulatory documents and FCA guidance notes
  • Location: Azure Blob Storage (UK South)
  • Access Method: RAG with vector embeddings (text-embedding-3-large)
  • Sensitivity: internal
  • Update Frequency: Weekly (aligned with FCA/PRA publications)
  • Versioning: Git-based with tagged releases per regulatory update
Knowledge

Product Catalogue

Low

Complete catalogue of banking products: current accounts, savings accounts, credit cards, personal loans, mortgages, and insurance. Includes rates, fees, eligibility criteria, and T&Cs.

  • Risk: Low
  • Data Formats: JSON, Markdown
  • Size: ~150 products with 2,000+ rate tiers
  • Location: PostgreSQL (UK South)
  • Access Method: REST API with product/eligibility filters
  • Sensitivity: public
  • Update Frequency: Daily (rates change with base rate)
  • Versioning: Timestamped with effective dates
Knowledge

Customer FAQ & Help Centre

Low

Curated knowledge base of 5,000+ frequently asked questions, how-to guides, troubleshooting steps, and policy explanations covering all banking services.

  • Risk: Low
  • Data Formats: Markdown, JSON
  • Size: ~5,000 articles, 800+ how-to guides
  • Location: Elasticsearch (UK South)
  • Access Method: Semantic search with BM25 + vector reranking
  • Sensitivity: public
  • Update Frequency: Bi-weekly
  • Versioning: CMS-managed with publish/draft states

Banking Orchestrator [Delegates]Account Manager Agent [Request]

Banking Orchestrator [Delegates]Customer Service Agent [Request]

Customer Service Agent [Reads KB]Customer FAQ & Help Centre [Query] Dotted
Customer Service Agent [Reads KB]Banking Regulations [Query] Dotted
Payments Agent [Confirmation]Fraud Detection Agent [Request]
Banking Orchestrator [Delegates]Input Validator [Connect]

Banking Orchestrator [Delegates]Eval Framework [Connect]
Banking Orchestrator [Delegates]Feedback Collector [Connect]
Banking Orchestrator [Delegates]Process Engine [Connect]

End User [Out]Banking Orchestrator [In]

Annotations

Online Banking Assistant
AI-powered conversational banking system. Tip: Check File → Version History to see how this project was built across 4 phases! Phase 1: Core agents (accounts + payments) Phase 2: Fraud detection & notifications Phase 3: Loans, credit & knowledge base Phase 4: Customer service & card management Edge styles: Solid = delegation / orchestration Dashed = API calls to backend services Dotted = knowledge / data lookups
